name: Hel
subtitle: Full Correspondences
flowText: Hel embodies underworld, wealth, endings — under Saturn · Pluto; in Scorpio, Capricorn.

related.name: ♇ Pluto
related.teaser: Pluto is the black sun — furnace of death, seed of rebirth, fire of shadows.

related.name: Osiris
related.teaser: Osiris embodies underworld, wealth, endings — under Saturn · Pluto; in Scorpio, Capricorn.

related.name: ♄ Saturn
related.teaser: Saturn is the black mountain — the ring of time, stern father, weight of law.

related.name: Obsidian
related.teaser: Root is the bedrock, the earth’s embrace — anchoring the soul into form.

related.name: Jet
related.teaser: Root is the bedrock, the earth’s embrace — anchoring the soul into form.

related.name: Zephyrus
related.teaser: Heart is the vesica of the world — the overlap where differences become devotion.

related.name: Danu
related.teaser: Danu embodies earth mother, nurture — under Venus · Saturn; in Taurus, Cancer.

related.name: Hathor
related.teaser: Hathor embodies earth mother, nurture — under Venus · Saturn; in Taurus, Cancer.

related.name: Ceres
related.teaser: Ceres embodies earth, grain, abundance — under Saturn · Venus; in Taurus, Virgo.

related.name: Isis
related.teaser: Isis embodies earth mother, nurture — under Venus · Saturn; in Taurus, Cancer.

related.name: Inari
related.teaser: Inari embodies hunt, fields, plenty — under Moon; in Sagittarius, Virgo.
